title: trifolium kingii subsp. rollinsii
intro: Trifolium kingii subsp. rollinsii, also known as Rollins' birdsfoot clover, is a subspecies of the Trifolium kingii plant, which is a perennial legume native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Trifolium kingii subsp. rollinsii include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve heart health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Trifolium kingii subsp. rollinsii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for easy incorporation into a healthy lifestyle and traditional medicine practices.
